_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Business analysis involves understanding the business needs and translating those requirements into solutions through detailed analysis and feedback.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-010 (AB, cosine: 0.504), AB-T-002 (AB, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.636). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, business]. DDaT-only terms [detailed, feedback, involves, needs, requirements, solutions] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, data, delivery, documented, execute, extraction] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.886, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DDaT element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Business analysis involves understanding the business needs and translating thos" and "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.623 ≈ STS 0.636 (gap 0.014). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, business] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [analysis, business]. DDaT-only: [detailed, feedback, involves, needs, requirements, solutions]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, data, delivery, documented, execute, extraction].
